overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring an alien desert landscape with erupting geothermal geysers, snow-dusted rocky terrain, and dramatic golden hour lighting. The player character walks continuously through a valley past distinctive rock formations and steaming geothermal vents, with a sci-fi weapon visible at the bottom of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal basin with erupting geyser and steam pools

events.description: geyser erupts violently sending steam and debris into the air
begins walking along the edge of the geothermal water channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered path beside a steaming geothermal pool with a geyser erupting ahead

entered.detail: tall erupting geothermal vent shooting steam and water high into the air
steep layered rock formation forming the right boundary of the valley
circular pool of water with mineral deposits around the edges
snow-dusted rocky terrain covering the walking path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dramatic geothermal landscape with a large geyser erupting in the distance, backlit by golden hour sun. The camera moves forward along a snow-covered path beside a steaming pool, with rocky cliffs rising on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path with tilted rock formation

events.description: large tilted rock formation comes into view on the left side
sun becomes obscured by clouds shifting the lighting from golden to cool purple tones

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliffside path passing multiple smaller geothermal vents

entered.detail: massive angular boulder tilted at 45 degrees with layered sedimentary texture
multiple steam vents visible in the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the cliffside as a distinctive tilted rock formation dominates the left side of the frame. The lighting shifts to cooler purple tones as clouds obscure the sun, while multiple geothermal vents become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky plateau with scattered boulders

events.description: exits the narrow cliffside path into open terrain with scattered rocks
slight turn toward a distant metal structure visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: traversing the open rocky terrain toward a large rock mound and distant structures

entered.detail: rounded hill-sized rock formation with layered orange and white strata
various sized rocks strewn across the snow-covered ground
distant elevated metal platform or building with support pillars

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cliffside into an open plateau scattered with boulders, the camera approaches a large rounded rock mound. A distant metal platform structure becomes visible on the right horizon, suggesting artificial construction in the alien landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal field with active geyser and metal ruins

events.description: sun emerges from clouds creating intense lens flare and golden backlighting
approaching close to active geyser with heavy steam obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: approaching a large erupting geyser with the sun creating dramatic backlighting through the steam

entered.detail: large geothermal vent erupting with golden steam backlit by the sun
bright sun low on the horizon creating lens flare effects

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a large active geyser with the sun emerging from clouds to create dramatic golden backlighting through the steam. The metal platform structure draws closer on the right as the camera moves toward the erupting vent, ending with intense sun flare and geothermal mist filling the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey through a geothermal alien valley that shifts from golden sunlight into cool shadows before returning to a brilliant, backlit finale. It begins along a snow-covered path beside a steaming pool, moving past rocky cliffs toward a large erupting geyser in the distance. As the camera continues along the cliffside, the lighting transitions to cooler purple tones under obscuring clouds, revealing a tilted rock formation and a cluster of distant geothermal vents. The scene then opens onto a boulder-strewn plateau where the camera passes a large rounded rock mound and catches sight of a metal platform structure on the horizon. Finally, the sun emerges from the clouds to create intense golden backlighting as the camera approaches a massive active geyser, ending with geothermal mist and a bright sun flare filling the frame.
